frontmatter.title: LUNA
frontmatter.title_sub: Living in Urban with Nature: Placemaking for Community Spaces & Local Business Support
frontmatter.abstract: This project, named LUNA (Living in Urban with Nature), repurposes an old Paragon warehouse in Jakarta into a sustainable community space. Focused on inclusive green areas, eco-friendly practices, and diverse activities, LUNA transforms the space into a vibrant hub supporting local businesses. With plans for culinary events, sales training, and shared kitchen experiences, LUNA aims to boost the Agricultural Hub brand through effective marketing and social campaigns. The project seeks to diversify revenue streams with co-working spaces and retail sales, ensuring sustained success and community enrichment. In summary, LUNA is an architectural initiative aligned with local needs, transforming an underutilized space into an environmentally conscious haven.
frontmatter.pr_contributor: Placemaking Group B (Analisia, Arnott, Asyara, Bintan, Fadhilah, Fathur, Karunia, Prisca, Reliya, Shanina & Zahrul)
frontmatter.pr_jury: Adjie Negara, Ardzuna Sinaga, Wenie Martin, RIlly Roobi Gusadi, Widiyani, Baskoro Tedjo
frontmatter.pr_type: Collaborative work in the Summer Course by Institut Teknologi Bandung (ITB)

mdx.body:
# Design Concept ![Design Concept](./figures/luna-design-concept.jpg "Design Concept") Design Concept. ![Design Concept: Axonometric](./figures/luna-axonometric.jpg "Design Concept: Axonometric") Design Concept: Axonometric. # Design Framework ![Design Framework](./figures/luna-design-framework.jpg "Design Framework") Design Framework. # Activities ![Activities](./figures/luna-activities.jpg "Activities") Activities. The facility meets community needs with spaces for sports, cultivation, sightseeing, and gatherings. It offers areas for play, work, study, and shopping. The Badminton Court hosts sports, and the Park serves as a venue for community gatherings. The Shared Kitchen features monthly programs like ‘cooking with a chef.’ In summary, it’s a compact and accessible hub for diverse activities. # Participatory Design
![Participatory Design: Play Area](./figures/luna-participatory-design-play-area.png "Participatory Design: Play Area") ![Participatory Design:Community Hall](./figures/luna-participatory-design-community-hall.png "Participatory Design:Community Hall") ![Participatory Design: Pavilion](./figures/luna-participatory-design-pavilion.png "Participatory Design: Pavilion") ![Participatory Design: Canteen & Shared Kitchen](./figures/luna-participatory-design-canteen-shared-kitchen.png "Participatory Design: Canteen & Shared Kitchen")
Participatory Design. Participatory design guides our use of recycled materials in the Playground, Community Hall, Pavilion, and Canteen & Shared Kitchen, employing sustainable elements like polycarbonate, particle board, perforated floor, and reused steel for an eco-friendly approach. This commitment aligns with our vision for a sustainable, community-centric environment. # Sustainable Food System Integration: Public Park & Warehouse (Local Residents) ![Sustainable Food System Integration: Public Park & Warehouse (Local Residents)](./figures/luna-integration.jpg "Sustainable Food System Integration: Public Park & Warehouse (Local Residents)") Sustainable Food System Integration: Public Park & Warehouse (Local Residents). # Sustainable Food System Approach for Construction Phase ![Sustainable Food System Approach for Construction Phase](./figures/luna-const-phase.jpg "Sustainable Food System Approach for Construction Phase") Sustainable Food System Approach for Construction Phase. # Financial Scheme ![Financial Scheme](./figures/luna-financial-scheme.jpg "Financial Scheme") Financial Scheme. The financial strategy relies on revenue from Co-Working Space, MICE events, art performances, and profit sharing from retail and F&B sales in repurposed Ex-Warehouses. These funds support the maintenance and activities at Public Park, fostering a sustainable business ecosystem. # Stakeholder Engagement & Sustainable Initiatives ![Stakeholder Engagement & Sustainable Initiatives](./figures/luna-stakeholder-map-potrait.png "Section") Stakeholder Engagement & Sustainable Initiatives. ![Stakeholder Engagement & Sustainable Initiatives](./figures/luna-stakeholder-map-landscape.png "Section") Stakeholder Engagement & Sustainable Initiatives. # Perspective ![Section](./figures/luna-section.png "Section") Section.
![Sports Zone](./figures/luna-pers-sports-zone.png "Sports Zone") Sports Zone ![Agricultural Hub](./figures/luna-pers-agricultural-hub.png "Agricultural Hub") Agricultural Hub ![Canteen & Shared Kitchen](./figures/luna-pers-canteen-shared-kitchen.png "Canteen & Shared Kitchen") Canteen & Shared Kitchen ![Community](./figures/luna-pers-community.png "Community") Community ![Community Hall](./figures/luna-pers-community-hall.png "Community Hall") Community Hall ![Co-working Space & Event Hall](./figures/luna-pers-co-working-space-event-hall.png "Co-working Space & Event Hall") Co-working Space & Event Hall ![Play Area](./figures/luna-pers-play-area.png "Play Area") Play Area ![Plaza & Street Market (Pavilion)](./figures/luna-pers-plaza-street-market-pavilion.png "Plaza & Street Market (Pavilion)") Plaza & Street Market (Pavilion)
Perspective. # Animation
